2606.07953.title: Unification of Closed-Open Industrial Detection Scenarios: New Large-Scale Benchmarks,Challenges and Baselines
2606.07953.paper_summary: Large-scale Visual-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable success in natural visual tasks, yet their application to industrial defect detection remains challenging due to two fundamental limitations: (i) the scarcity of large-scale industrial datasets that cover diverse defect categories across multiple domains, and (ii) the reliance on manual prompts (points, boxes, masks) that introduce subjective noise and lack text-visual interaction for fine-grained understanding. To address these challenges, we introduce a Large-Scale Multi-Modal Industrial Open-Closed benchmark (MMIOC-1M) containing over one million samples across $14$ super-categories, $29$ industrial scenes, and $351$ defect subcategories. To our knowledge, MMIOC-1M is the first unified largest benchmark supporting both open-vocabulary and closed-set industrial detection, providing valuable pre-training data for LVLMs in industrial scenarios. Furthermore, we propose a Refined Text-Visual Prompt Network (RTVPNet) that incorporates three key innovations: (1) an expert-assisted domain projection mechanism that enables rapid adaptation of general vision models to industrial domains, (2) an energy-based sparse sampling strategy that automatically generates refined visual prompts without manual intervention, and (3) a bidirectional text-visual interaction module that enhances cross-modal semantic alignment and understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RTVPNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on MMIOC-1M, LVIS, and COCO benchmarks while maintaining computational efficiency. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/hellozzk/MMIO.
2606.07953.paper_summary_zh: 大型視覺語言模型（LVLMs）在自然視覺任務中取得了顯著的成功，但其在工業缺陷檢測中的應用仍然面臨挑戰，主要有兩個根本限制：（i）缺乏涵蓋多個領域中各種缺陷類別的大型工業數據集，以及（ii）依賴手動提示（點、框、面具），這引入了主觀噪音，並且缺乏文本與視覺的互動以進行細緻理解。為了解決這些挑戰，我們介紹了一個大型多模態工業開放-封閉基準（MMIOC-1M），其中包含超過一百萬個樣本，涵蓋$14$個超類別、$29$個工業場景和$351$個缺陷子類別。據我們所知，MMIOC-1M是第一個支持開放詞彙和封閉集工業檢測的統一最大基準，為LVLMs在工業場景中提供了有價值的預訓練數據。此外，我們提出了一個精煉文本-視覺提示網絡（RTVPNet），該網絡包含三個關鍵創新：（1）一個專家輔助的領域投影機制，使得通用視覺模型能夠快速適應工業領域，（2）一種基於能量的稀疏採樣策略，自動生成精煉的視覺提示而無需手動干預，以及（3）一個雙向文本-視覺互動模塊，增強跨模態的語義對齊和理解。大量實驗表明，RTVPNet在MMIOC-1M、LVIS和COCO基準上達到了最先進的性能，同時保持了計算效率。數據集和代碼可在 https://github.com/hellozzk/MMIO 獲得。
2606.07953.author: Zekai Zhang et.al.
2606.07953.authors: Zekai Zhang, Jinglin Zhang, Qinghui Chen, Gang Li, Da Chen, Shuainan Jing, He Wang, Dagang Li, Cong Liu, Cong Bai, Shengyong Chen
